title: Operation Blunt Stick

After the destruction of [[Relentless (Sunaj IV)|''Relentless'']], '''Operation Blunt Stick''' was a brief operation led by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] to destroy an Imperial listening probe in a minefield, in order to allow the Rebel fleet to migrate to [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] unnoticed.

On that operation, Imperial Corvette groups ''[[TIE Fire]]'' and [[Striker (corvette group)|''Striker'']] were destroyed, along with the three [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]], which were carrying mines, [[Kan (freighter)|''Kan'']], [[Kant (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Kant'']] and ''[[Wunt]]''.
